discovery_reconciliation.note: 15 policies modeled below (5 sub + 10 MG). 6 ArcBox policies listed in excludedAssignments — they only affect rg-arcbox-swc01 and have zero impact on this project.

excludedAssignments.displayName: Deploy Dependency Agent for Linux VMs
Deploy Dependency Agent for Windows VMs
Configure Linux VMs to run Azure Monitor Agent
Configure Windows VMs to run Azure Monitor Agent

deny.description: Denies resource group creation if any of 9 mandatory tags are missing
deny.adaptation: All resource groups MUST include 9 tags: environment, owner, costcenter, application, workload, sla, backup-policy, maint-window, technical-contact

deny.displayName: SFI-ID4.2.2 SQL DB - Safe Secrets Standard
deny.description: Denies Azure SQL Server creation without Azure AD-only authentication enabled
deny.bicepPropertyPathAVM: The AVM sql/server module abstracts this via the administrators block: administrators.azureADOnlyAuthentication
deny.adaptation: Azure SQL Server MUST set azureADOnlyAuthentication: true. Already planned — no change needed.

deny.description: Blocks Classic (v1) resource types: ClassicCompute, ClassicStorage, ClassicNetwork
deny.requiredValue: Must not be Classic resource types
deny.adaptation: No impact — project uses only ARM (v2) resource types.

deny.description: Denies creation of Classic resource types via MCAPSGov initiative
deny.requiredValue: Must not be in blocked list (Classic resources only)
deny.adaptation: No impact — project uses only ARM (v2) resource types.

deny.displayName: MCAPSGov Deny - Block VM SKUs (H, M, N series)
deny.description: Blocks HB, M-series, and N-series (GPU) VM SKUs
deny.requiredValue: Must not be H, M, or N-series SKU
deny.adaptation: No impact — project does not use VMs.

deny.displayName: Key Vault Managed HSM - Purge Protection Enabled
deny.description: Requires purge protection on Key Vault Managed HSM
deny.adaptation: No impact — project uses Key Vault Standard (not Managed HSM).

deny.displayName: MFA Enforcement for Resource Delete Actions
deny.description: Requires MFA for resource delete operations
deny.adaptation: Deployer account must have MFA enabled. Affects teardown only, not creation.

deny.displayName: MFA Enforcement for Resource Write Actions
deny.description: Requires MFA for resource write (create/update) operations
deny.adaptation: Deployer account must have MFA enabled. Affects all deployments.

audit.description: Regulatory compliance initiative for GDPR. Audits services for encryption, access controls, and data residency.
audit.adaptation: Data residency in swedencentral satisfies EU requirement. TLS 1.2 and encryption at rest align with GDPR.

audit.description: PCI DSS v4 compliance audit. Checks network segmentation, encryption, access controls.
audit.adaptation: Private Endpoints + VNet isolation satisfy network segmentation. Payment scope minimized via external gateway.

audit.description: Comprehensive security baseline. Audits TLS, encryption, identity, network isolation, and monitoring across all services.
audit.adaptation: Architecture design already aligns with ASB — TLS 1.2, MI, PE, HTTPS-only, Key Vault.

audit.description: 44 audit policies covering: SQL threat detection, TLS enforcement, FTP-S only for App Service, diagnostic settings, Defender plans, activity logs.
audit.adaptation: Key audits relevant to project: App Service FTPS-only, SQL auditing and threat detection, SQL TLS, diagnostic settings. Plan includes all requirements.

audit.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud data protection checks
audit.adaptation: No action needed during deployment — Defender audits are post-deployment.

deployIfNotExists_modify.displayName: JV - Inherit Multiple Tags from Resource Group
deployIfNotExists_modify.description: Automatically copies 9 tags from resource group to child resources: environment, owner, costcenter, application, workload, sla, backup-policy, maint-window, technical-contact
deployIfNotExists_modify.adaptation: Tags set on RG will auto-propagate. Set all 9 tags on RG level; child resources inherit automatically.

deployIfNotExists_modify.description: 27 policies including: disable blob anonymous access (Modify), disable local auth on Storage/EventHub/ServiceBus/CosmosDB, enable diagnostics on AI services, enable managed identity on VMs.
deployIfNotExists_modify.adaptation: Storage blob anonymous access already disabled in plan. Local auth disabled via allowSharedKeyAccess=false.

deployment_blockers.blocker: Resource group creation will fail without ALL 9 required tags
deployment_blockers.resolution: Include all 9 tags in resource group template: environment, owner, costcenter, application, workload, sla, backup-policy, maint-window, technical-contact

deployment_blockers.policy: SFI-ID4.2.2 SQL DB - Safe Secrets Standard
deployment_blockers.blocker: SQL Server creation will fail without Azure AD-only auth
deployment_blockers.resolution: Set azureADOnlyAuthentication: true — already in architecture plan

deployment_blockers.policy: MFA Enforcement for Resource Write Actions
deployment_blockers.blocker: Deployment will fail if deployer account lacks MFA
deployment_blockers.resolution: Ensure deployer identity has MFA enabled (proven path). OIDC workload identity is a conditional alternative — NOT YET VALIDATED against this tenant's write-action enforcement. Test federated SP write before relying on OIDC for CI/CD.

tag_requirements.note: Tags are enforced at RG level by Deny policy. A Modify policy auto-inherits all 9 tags to child resources.
